godot_hook_investigation.note: Investigation only; external/godot-master is NOT modified. Paths and functions are recorded for the later patch 0020 call-site gate and the patch 0021 native-handle mapping. This S1-S3 slice delivers the OFFLINE face only (contract trio + offline kernel + math parity); the hook/patch and dispatch smoke are later slices.

storage_class.native_pass_shape: compute dispatch of COPY_MODE_FILL_INSTANCES: one thread per instance (local_size_x=64), reads Particles SSBO (set0 binding1) writes Transforms SSBO (set0 binding2); optional preceding FILL_SORT_BUFFER + sort_effects when draw_order==VIEW_DEPTH

call_sites.note: the FILL_INSTANCES compute_list dispatch (L1337-1351). The earlier FILL_SORT_BUFFER block (L1318-1331) is out of scope. Driven by the cull stage: renderer_scene_cull.cpp ~L2933 -> particles_set_view_axis.

godot_hook_investigation.hook_note: particles_set_view_axis is a cull-stage driver, structurally different from the post-process passes (luminance/tonemap/ssao_blur). The runtime hook/binding design is deferred to the later patch slice (0020 gate+callsite / 0021 runtime binding / 0022 recording+real-pass opt-in); this slice does not wire it.
godot_hook_investigation.source_resource: particles->particle_buffer (Particles SSBO, ParticleData[]; set0 binding1; particles_storage.cpp _particles_update_buffers L1394-1427)
godot_hook_investigation.dest_resource: particles->particle_instance_buffer (Transforms SSBO, vec4 data[]; set0 binding2; 3D stride = 5 vec4 per instance, doubled when motion vectors are enabled)

descriptor_mapping.instance_stride: 3D: 3 transposed xform rows + color + custom = 5 vec4 per instance
descriptor_mapping.requires_64bit_integer_shader_capability: particles_copy carries no i64 push-constant fields (unlike the GRX-009/010/011 texture passes), so SHADER_INT64 is NOT part of its preflight

supported_math_subset.variant: COPY_MODE_FILL_INSTANCES, 3D mode, single dispatch (one thread per instance)
supported_math_subset.active_branch: active = (flags & PARTICLE_FLAG_ACTIVE) || (flags & PARTICLE_FLAG_TRAILED); inactive -> zero basis + (-inf,-inf,-inf,0) translation column
supported_math_subset.billboard: axis=normalize(sort_direction); Rodrigues rotation by the selected custom channel angle; new_up=rotated*align_up; local=mat3(normalize(cross(new_up, sort_direction)), new_up, sort_direction)*mat3(txform)
supported_math_subset.column_major: Godot mat4 is column-major; the kernel loads the mat4 as 4 explicit float4 columns and mirrors the GLSL column-major algebra

known_gaps: 3D COPY_MODE_FILL_INSTANCES subset only; align_mode limited to ALIGN_DISABLED (0) and ALIGN_BILLBOARD (1)
2D copy mode (PARAMS_FLAG_COPY_MODE_2D + inv_emission_transform + 4-vec4 instance write) unsupported
MODE_FILL_SORT_BUFFER and COPY_MODE_FILL_INSTANCES_WITH_SORT_BUFFER (VIEW_DEPTH sort) unsupported; no USE_SORT_BUFFER binding
ORDER_BY_LIFETIME / REVERSE_LIFETIME draw-order reindex unsupported (kernel maps instance i <- particle i)
trail interpolation and trail_bind_poses (trail_size > 1) unsupported; no set2 TrailBindPoses binding
userdata channels (USERDATA_COUNT) unsupported; ParticleData stride fixed at 112 bytes
motion_vectors_current_offset carried in b0 but exercised at 0 (motion-vector double-buffer offset is a runtime concern)
cull-stage runtime hook (particles_set_view_axis / renderer_scene_cull.cpp) not wired; later patch slice
GPU-side math parity observation pending a real dispatch (math_parity_evidence.json)

compile_blockers.summary: the canonical particles_copy package is the owner-approved hlsl_bridge_workaround artifact (DXC cs_6_0 container validated by dxv, per-slot structured_buffer/rwstructured_buffer binding kinds, Rurix-owned RTS0). particles_copy is an all raw-buffer / SSBO pass, so the GRX-009 texture-intrinsic llc blocker does NOT apply; the workaround is used because (1) the Rurix lang subset has no aggregate (struct/vec4/mat4) SSBO element types (ParticleData is mat4+vec3+uint+vec4+vec4) and (2) the DXIL backend does not lower the sin/cos/sqrt device-math intrinsics ALIGN_BILLBOARD needs (DeviceMathFn is NVPTX-libdevice-only)

implementation_status.runtime_state_note: The DEFAULT runtime path stays fallback-only: with all per-pass settings at their false defaults the bridge still returns RXGD_STATUS_FALLBACK for RXGD_PASS_PARTICLES_COPY and the native Godot particles copy renders. real_gpu_pass=true / real_d3d12_dispatch_recorded=true record the strict MEASURED success of the opt-in real-pass arm (dispatch_real_pass under a d3d12-recording-shim bridge on the 0001..0022 scratch build); it is not a default enablement and carries no performance claim. The shipping feature-off bridge still fails closed with real_dispatch_path_not_linked, and the patch 0022 result writeback is a SCAFFOLD (native Godot particles copy stays the continuation/backstop and re-fills every instance every frame, so the candidate image cannot change and no net benefit exists yet). No estimated particles_copy GPU time is attributed.
implementation_status.bridge_gate: src/rurix-godot ParticlesCopyGate: preflight (2 structured-buffer resources, 128-byte b0 CopyPushConstant mirror, nonzero total_particles; NO int64 cap check because particles_copy's b0 carries no i64 fields) -> dispatch eligibility (RXGD_CAP_PARTICLES_COPY_REAL_PASS opt-in, the int64 device/recording-harness capability, non-null native handles, ParticlesCopyDispatchPackage layout/digest match vs offline evidence) -> per-slot kernel-binding-kind conformance ([structured_buffer, rwstructured_buffer]) -> math-parity gate (fill_instances_cpu_reference_proven_pending_gpu_dispatch) -> real dispatch only under the d3d12-recording-shim feature; every failure records a fallback reason and prints the once-per-session RXGD_PARTICLES_COPY_REAL_PASS_BLOCKED diagnostic. Because int64 is NOT in the preflight, the forced capability downgrade fails closed one level later at dispatch_eligibility_failed (not runtime_binding_preflight_failed like the texture passes).
implementation_status.godot_module_patch: spike/godot-rurix/patches/0020-rurix-accel-particles-copy-pass-gate-and-callsite.patch (stacked on 0001..0019; default-false rendering/rurix_accel/passes/particles_copy/enabled setting, try_record_particles_copy() module gate, default-false virtual D3D12Hooks::try_record_particles_copy(), and the particles_set_view_axis COPY_MODE_FILL_INSTANCES call-site opt-in gate in particles_storage.cpp guarded by !do_sort; the native fill-instances dispatch is always preserved as fallback/continuation). The runtime native-handle binding is patch 0021-rurix-accel-particles-copy-runtime-resource-binding.patch and the recording-smoke + real-pass opt-in arms are patch 0022-rurix-accel-particles-copy-recording-smoke-and-real-pass-optin.patch

wired_call_sites.note: opt-in gate calls D3D12Hooks::try_record_particles_copy() before the native fill-instances dispatch, guarded by !do_sort so only the plain COPY_MODE_FILL_INSTANCES subset is in scope (patch 0020/0021; applyability verified via git apply --check on a scratch copy). The cull stage only calls particles_set_view_axis for billboard transform_align, so the enablement smoke uses TRANSFORM_ALIGN_Z_BILLBOARD with the default DRAW_ORDER_INDEX.

standalone_d3d12_dispatch_smoke.purpose: Prove the tracked offline particles_copy DXIL container + RTS0 root signature + descriptor layout can complete one minimal compute dispatch on a real D3D12 device/command queue with two structured buffers (SRV t0 + UAV u0) AND that every measured GPU output element matches the CPU reference (COPY_MODE_FILL_INSTANCES 3D subset on a deterministic synthetic ParticleData fixture) within tolerance. Standalone measured evidence only; the bridge records no dispatch and returns no OK.
does_not_imply: Godot runtime particles copy pass completion
any visual diff, measured fallback telemetry, or performance claim

real_pass_measured_success.real_gpu_pass_scope: opt_in_only: the measured real dispatch requires the default-false dispatch_real_pass arm plus a d3d12-recording-shim bridge DLL; the default runtime path stays fallback-only and the shipping feature-off bridge fails closed with real_dispatch_path_not_linked
real_pass_measured_success.pass_enable_matrix: three legs measured on the 0001..0022 scratch build: disabled_default (reference) / enabled_real_pass_optin (candidate, real_pass_marker + writeback_marker observed) / forced_capability_downgrade (RXGD_PARTICLES_COPY_REAL_PASS_BLOCKED first_missing_prerequisite=dispatch_eligibility_failed fallback_reason=unsupported_device)
real_pass_measured_success.scene: deterministic GPUParticles3D (fixed seed + fixed_fps, 4096 particles, TRANSFORM_ALIGN_Z_BILLBOARD so the cull stage drives particles_set_view_axis, default DRAW_ORDER_INDEX so do_sort=false selects the in-scope plain COPY_MODE_FILL_INSTANCES subset; dispatch=64x1x1=ceil(4096/64), dst_bytes=327680=4096*80)
real_pass_measured_success.ldr_visual_gate: max_abs=0 / mean_abs=0 (candidate is bit-exact to the reference because the writeback is a scaffold and the native particles copy continuation still re-fills every instance)

remaining_segments: align mode 2/3/4, 2D copy mode, COPY_MODE_FILL_INSTANCES_WITH_SORT_BUFFER (VIEW_DEPTH sort) and FILL_SORT_BUFFER, ORDER_BY_LIFETIME/REVERSE_LIFETIME reindex, trail interpolation, and userdata channels
raster/compute seam design or native-continuation retirement (net-benefit measurement)
per-pass FPS baseline comparison (contract requires >= 0.95x baseline before any default-enable discussion)

evidence_requirements.offline_compile: offline_compile_evidence.json (measured): DXC cs_6_0 compile + DXV validation pass + Rurix-owned RTS0 + descriptor layout; three artifact SHA-256 recomputable on disk
evidence_requirements.math_parity: math_parity_evidence.json: deterministic synthetic ParticleData CPU float32 reference (binary32 per op) with status=pending_gpu_dispatch
evidence_requirements.visual: in-engine LDR absolute diff recorded by the real-pass enablement smoke: reference (disabled) vs candidate (opt-in real pass) vs forced-fallback frames, all within the pinned thresholds (max_abs<=2, mean_abs<=0.25); measured max_abs=0/mean_abs=0 because the writeback is a scaffold and the native continuation renders
evidence_requirements.perf: reuse GRX-006 baseline/perf gate; no perf improvement claimed

disclaimer: GRX-013 particles_copy is closed out at the stage-A5-equivalent level (mirroring GRX-011 ssao_blur): the pass contract trio, the DXC/DXV/RTS0 offline kernel package (hlsl_bridge_workaround provenance, Rurix-owned RTS0), the fail-closed bridge ParticlesCopyGate (default RXGD_STATUS_FALLBACK; opt-in RXGD_CAP_PARTICLES_COPY_REAL_PASS arm), the Godot patch stack 0001..0022 (patches 0020-0022: per-pass settings default false + call-site opt-in gate + runtime native-handle binding + recording-smoke/real-pass opt-in; native particles copy always preserved), the standalone real D3D12 dispatch smoke, and the gated real-pass enablement gate that recorded a strict MEASURED success (real_pass_enablement_success_evidence.json, strict_success=true). implemented=true / real_gpu_pass=true / real_d3d12_dispatch_recorded=true record the MEASURED opt-in real-pass arm only. The DEFAULT path stays fallback-only, default_enable_state stays disabled per the owner decision (real_pass_default_enable_decision.json, keep_default_disabled), the shipping feature-off bridge still fails closed with real_dispatch_path_not_linked, the patch 0022 writeback is a SCAFFOLD (native Godot particles copy continuation/backstop re-fills every instance every frame; candidate image bit-exact), and NO visual-superiority, GPU-timestamp, FPS, or performance improvement is claimed.
